metaDesc: Tevedzera nguva yeTestamende Yekare, upenyu hwaJesu, uye nzendo dzaPauro pamepu chaiyo — Bhaibheri rakaitika munzvimbo chaidzo.

s.title: Bhaibheri neMepu
s.verse: “Nokuti hatina kutevera ngano dzokufungwa nenjere, nguva yatakakuzivisai simba nokuuya kwaIshe wedu Jesu Kristu, asi takanga tiri vanhu vakaona humambo hwake.” (2 Petro 1:16)
s.purpose: Bhaibheri harisi ngano. Chinyorwa chevanhu vakafamba munzvimbo chaidzo, pamazuva chaiwo, uye pamazita chaiwo. Tevedzera nzira idzodzo pamepu, nokulandanana kwenguva — tinya nzvimbo, kana udzvanye ▶ kuti ufambe nayo danho nedanho.
s.ot_lead: Kwete rwendo rumwe asi kuyerera kwenhoroondo yoruponeso kubva pakusika zvichienda mberi: kusika nokuwa → mafashamo neBhabheri → kudanwa (Abhurahamu) → nyika yakavimbiswa → Kubuda kweIjipiti → renje → kukunda → ushe → kupatsanurwa → utapwa → kudzoka.
s.je_lead: Tevera upenyu hwaJesu sokunyorwa kwahunoitwa neMavhangeri, nokulandanana — kubva pakuzvarwa kwake muBhetirehema, kubudikidza norubhabhatidzo rwake noushumiri hwake muGarirea, kupfuura Samaria, kusvika pamuchinjikwa, kumuka, nokukwira kudenga muJerusarema.
s.pa_h: Kubva kuAndiyokiya kusvika kumigumo yenyika — Roma
s.pa_lead: Kubva paPendekosti muJerusarema, vhangeri rakapararira sei kupfuura Judhea — kubudikidza neAsia Diki neYuropu kusvika pamwoyo woumambo. Sarudza rumwe rwenzendo shanu (1·2·3 + rwendo rwokuenda kuRoma + mushure mokusunungurwa) uye utevedzere zviitiko zveMabasa netsamba dzakanyorwa munzira.
s.foot: Mavambo · Nzvimbo dzinotevedzera chinyorwa cheBhaibheri nejogirafi yeBhaibheri yakajairwa (nemazita amazuva ano panobatsira). Mahombekombe, nzizi, namadziva zvakaveziswa kubva padata rejogirafi yakavhurika (Natural Earth), zvakareruswa.

eden.name: Edheni (Kusika · Kuwa)
eden.note: Munyika yakaitwa “yakanaka kwazvo,” chivi chinopinda chichityora ukama pakati paMwari navanhu.
events: Chivimbiso chokutanga chevhangeri — “rudzi rwomukadzi ruchapwanya musoro wenyoka”

noah.name: Ararati (Mafashamo)
noah.note: Mwari anotonga nyika yakazara nechivi, asi anochengetedza upenyu kubudikidza nemhuri imwe chete.

babel.name: Shongwe yeBhabheri
babel.note: Pakuzvikudza kunosvika kudenga, Mwari anovhiringidza mutauro wavo nokuparadzira vanhu pasi rose.
events: Vanhu vanopararira pasi rose (Shinari — gare gare Bhabhironi)

ur.name: Uri
ur.note: Nyaya yeBhaibheri yoruponeso inotanga nokudanwa kwomurume mumwe.
events: Mwari anodana Abhuramu kuti abve muUri yavaKaradhia
“Ndichakuita rudzi rukuru… marudzi ose acharopafadzwa mauri”

haran.name: Harani
haran.note: Munzira, achipindura kudanwa achienda kunyika yakavimbiswa.
events: Abhuramu anosimuka achienda kuKenani ava namakore makumi manomwe namashanu

shechem.name: Shekemu · Kenani
shechem.note: Munyika yakavimbiswa mhuri inotangwa uye sungano inopfuurira kuzvizvarwa.
events: Kupinda muKenani, atari yokutanga — “ndichapa nyika iyi rudzi rwako”
Vanakomana gumi navaviri vaJakobho — mudzi wamarudzi gumi namaviri

egypt.name: Ijipiti (Gosheni)
egypt.note: Mhuri inova rudzi rukuru — ipapo inova rudzi rwavaranda.
events: Josefa, akatengeswa, anokwirira kuva mubati muIjipiti
Mhuri yose yaJakobho inoburuka kuzotiza nzara

sinai.name: Gomo reSinai
sinai.note: Ruponeso rukuru rweTestamende Yekare — varanda vanova vanhu vaMwari pachavo.

kadesh.name: Kadheshi (renje)
kadesh.note: Kusatenda kunotorera chizvarwa nyika — asi Mwari anogara navo.
events: Vasori gumi navaviri — asi vanhu vanoramba kutenda
Makore makumi matatu namasere murenje — mana, gore, nomoto

shiloh.name: Shiro (Vatongi)
shiloh.note: Pasina mambo, munhu wose anoita zvaanoda — mambo wechokwadi anodikanwa.
events: Rute — kutendeka mumazuva erima, mumutsara waDhavhidhi

jerusalem.name: Jerusarema · Ushe Hwakabatana
jerusalem.note: Nguva yepamusoro yeIsiraeri — nechivimbiso chamambo asingaperi.
events: Sauro mambo wokutanga, ipapo Dhavhidhi naGoriati
Sungano yaDhavhidhi — “chigaro chako choushe nokusingaperi” (2 Sam 7)

samaria.name: Samaria · Ushe Hwakapatsanurwa
samaria.note: Ushe hunopatsanuka uye hunoderera vaporofita vachichema.
events: Mushure maSoromoni, kupatsanurwa kuva Judha neIsiraeri
Eria, Isaya, Jeremia vanochema ‘dzokai’ — uye vanoprofita Mesiya

nineveh.name: Ninevhe (Asiria)
nineveh.note: Vachifuratira yambiro yose, ushe hwokumusoro hunowira hwokutanga.

babylon.name: Bhabhironi
babylon.note: Usiku hwakasviba pane hwose — asi chivimbiso chokudzoreredzwa chinosara.

susa.name: Shushani (Persia)
susa.note: Kunyange pamwoyo woumambo hwavahedheni, Mwari anochengeta vanhu vake.
events: Nehemia anonyengetera pamberi pamambo uye anotumwa

return.name: Kudzoka kuJerusarema
return.note: Vanodzoka vovakazve — asi hapana mambo akauya. Vanomirira Mesiya.
events: Mapoka matatu okudzoka nechirevo chaKoreshi (Zerubhabheri 538 · Ezira 458 · Nehemia 444)
Maraki — Testamende Yekare inopera: “Ndinotuma nhume yangu”

bethlehem.name: Bhetirehema
bethlehem.note: Mesiya akavimbiswa anouya kuguta raDhavhidhi — Izwi rakazova nyama.

nazareth.name: Nazareta
events: Ava namakore gumi namaviri, achibvunza nokupindura mutemberi
Gare gare anorambwa musinagoge reguta rake

jordan.name: Rwizi rweJorodhani
jordan.note: Ushumiri hwake hwapachena hunotanga — denga rinomusimbisa soMwanakomana.
events: Mweya unoburuka senjiva — “Uyu ndiye Mwanakomana wangu anodikanwa”

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Pachiratidzo chake chokutanga anoratidza kubwinya kwake.
events: Mvura inoshandurwa kuva waini — chiratidzo chake chokutanga

sychar.name: Sikari (Samaria)
sychar.note: Nzira youshumiri hwokutanga — kubudikidza neJerusarema kusvika kuSamaria yaizvidzwa.

capernaum.name: Kapenaume
capernaum.note: Nzvimbo huru youshumiri hweGarirea — kudana, kudzidzisa, nokupikiswa zvinosangana pano.
events: Anodana varedzi vehove uye anozvigarisa pano

galilee.name: Gungwa reGarirea
galilee.note: Nesimba pamusoro pezvakasikwa anoratidza kuti ndiani.
events: Anodyisa zviuru zvishanu nezvingwa zvishanu nehove mbiri

caesarea_p.name: Kesaria Firipi
caesarea_p.note: Vadzidzi vanonzwisisa kuti ndiye Kristu, uye nzira yomuchinjikwa inovhurika.
events: Kupupura kwaPetro — “Ndimi Kristu, Mwanakomana waMwari mupenyu”
Anotanga kuprofita rufu rwake nokumuka kwake

bethany.name: Bhetani
bethany.note: Anoratidza simba pamusoro porufu pava pedyo nevhiki yake yokupedzisira.
events: Anomutsa Razaro kubva muguva — “Ndini kumuka noupenyu”

jerusalem.name: Jerusarema
jerusalem.note: Pamusoro penyaya pose iyo Bhaibheri rinonongedzera — muchinjikwa, kumuka, kukwira kudenga.
events: Kupinda nokukunda; anopidigura matafura etemberi zvakare
Akamuka nezuva retatu, ipapo akakwira kudenga

antioch.name: Andiyokiya
antioch.note: Kereke inotuma uko ushumiri kuvahedheni hunotanga uye hunodzokera.
events: Nzvimbo yokutangira rwendo rwokutanga, rwechipiri, norwechitatu

seleucia.name: Sereukia
seleucia.note: Chiteshi cheAndiyokiya — vanokwira chikepe kuenda kuSaipirosi.

paphos.name: Pafosi
paphos.note: Simba rinoratidzwa kune avo vanopikisa vhangeri.

perga.name: Perga
perga.note: Chiteshi muPamufiria — pano Johani Mako anodzokera.

iconium.name: Ikoniamu
iconium.note: Vazhinji vanotenda, asi kutambudzwa kunovaita kuti vaenderere.

derbe.name: Dhebhe
derbe.note: Vadzidzi vazhinji vanoitwa; vanodzokera nenzira yavo kuzosimbisa makereke.

troas.name: Tro'asi
troas.note: Nzvimbo yokushanduka uko vhangeri rinotanga kunanga kuYuropu.

philippi.name: Firipi
philippi.note: Kereke yokutanga muYuropu — vhangeri rinokunda kunyange mutorongo.
events: Nziyo dzapakati pousiku, kudengenyeka kwenyika, mhuri yomuchengeti wetorongo inoponeswa

thess.name: Tesaronika
thess.note: Shoko rinozunungutsa guta uye kupikiswa kunopfachuka.

berea.name: Bheriya
events: Mazuva ose vanonzvera Magwaro kuti vatarise

corinth.name: Korinde
corinth.note: Anogara gore nehafu, achisima kereke muguta rezvakaipa.

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Mwoyo worwendo rwechitatu — shoko rinopararira muAsia.
events: Kudzidzisa mazuva ose kwemakore maviri muimba yaTiranosi

caesarea.name: Kesaria
caesarea.note: Kwamakore maviri anodzivirira vhangeri pamberi pavabati namambo.

jerusalem.name: Jerusarema
jerusalem.note: Akabatwa mutemberi, nzira yake somusungwa inotanga.
events: Sezvo ari muvati weRoma, anotumirwa pasi pavarindi kuKesaria

crete.name: Krete
crete.note: Mushure mokusunungurwa kwake, chitsuwa kwaanosiya Tito kuti agadzirise makereke.
events: Anosiya Tito kuti agadze vakuru muguta rimwe nerimwe

malta.name: Marita
malta.note: Kuburikidza nedutu nokuparara kwechikepe, chivimbiso chaMwari chinomira.
events: ‘Mhepo yokuchamhembe-mabvazuva’ inoparadza chikepe, asi vose mazana maviri namakumi manomwe nevatanhatu vanopona

puteoli.name: Puteori
puteoli.note: Vanosvika muItaly uye vanochingamidzwa nehama dzavanotenda.

rome.name: Roma
rome.note: Vhangeri rinosvika pamwoyo woumambo pakupedzisira — kwete magumo asi mavambo.
events: Makore maviri ari pasi pomurindo mumba, achiparidza ushe akashinga
Gare gare akasungwa zvakare, anonyora 2 Timoti uye anourayiwa — “Ndarwa kurwa kwakanaka, ndapedza nhangemutange”
